recommendations.title: Predator: Badlands
recommendations.overview: Cast out from his clan, a young Predator finds an unlikely ally in a damaged android and embarks on a treacherous journey in search of the ultimate adversary.

recommendations.title: Predator: Killer of Killers
recommendations.overview: While three of the fiercest warriors in human history—a Viking raider, a ninja in feudal Japan, and a WWII pilot—are killers in their own right, they are merely prey for their new opponent: the ultimate killer of killers.

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: When danger threatens her camp, the fierce and highly skilled Comanche warrior Naru sets out to protect her people. But the prey she stalks turns out to be a highly evolved alien predator with a technically advanced arsenal.

recommendations.title: Let's Be Evil
recommendations.overview: A woman enters an underground bunker where gifted children use augmented reality technology to wreak havoc.

recommendations.title: Room
recommendations.overview: Held captive for 7 years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

recommendations.title: La Jetée
recommendations.overview: A man confronts his past during an experiment that attempts to find a solution to the problems of a post-apocalyptic world caused by a world war.

recommendations.title: After.Life
recommendations.overview: Following a terrible car crash, a woman awakes to find an enigmatic mortician preparing her for burial.

recommendations.title: The Dead Zone
recommendations.overview: Johnny Smith is a schoolteacher with his whole life ahead of him but, after leaving his fiancee's home one night, is involved in a car crash which leaves him in a coma for 5 years. When he wakes, he discovers he has an ability to see into the past, p

recommendations.title: Day of the Dead: Bloodline
recommendations.overview: In a world overrun by zombies, military personnel and survivalists live in an underground bunker while they seek a cure.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.
